attribution: V. Panayotov, G. Chen, D. Povey, S. Khudanpur. LibriSpeech: An ASR corpus based on public domain audio books. IEEE ICASSP, 2015.
modifications: Extracted single FLAC from test-clean/1221/135767/1221-135767-0010.flac; re-encoded to 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV via ffmpeg -ac 1 -ar 16000 -c:a pcm_s16le. No trimming.
expected_text: She screamed and shouted, too, with a terrific volume of sound, which doubtless caused the hearts of the fugitives to quake within them.
